goal: Build a sustainable marketing system that consistently tells The Station and Twin City Brewing's story, driving reservations, attracting travelers off Highway 4, and leveraging existing in-house talent and equipment. Within 90 days, you'll have a content rhythm that takes about 4-5 hours weekly, two Meta ad campaigns running profitably, and a Google presence that dominates local search and drives consistent reviews.

weeks.title: Week 1 — Content & Google Foundations
actions: Define your four content pillars and document them for the team
Set up content calendar template for weekly rhythm
Audit both Google Business Profiles and verify ownership
Complete all business information on both listings
checklist: Four content pillars defined and visible to team
Content calendar created with pillar rotation
Both GBP listings verified and accessible
Hours, phone, address accurate on both profiles

weeks.title: Week 2 — Photo Blitz & Pixel Setup
actions: Upload 15+ photos to each Google Business Profile
Add menu and ResOS reservation links to GBP
Install Meta Pixel on website
Build core audiences in Meta Ads Manager
Prepare filming kit and test equipment
checklist: 15+ photos live on The Station GBP
15+ photos live on Twin City Brewing GBP
Menu and booking links added to both profiles
Meta Pixel installed and firing (verified with Pixel Helper)
Website Visitors and Social Engagers audiences created

weeks.title: Week 3 — First Filming Session & Campaign 1 Launch
actions: Complete first Tuesday filming session
Edit and schedule first batch of 3+ posts
Create Lookalike Audience from website visitors
Set up and launch Campaign 1 (Weekend Reservations)
Publish first weekly GBP posts on both listings
checklist: First GBP posts published on both listings

weeks.title: Week 4 — Review System & Campaign 2 Launch
actions: Design and print review request cards with QR code
Train staff on review-ask process
Set up and launch Campaign 2 (Traveler Awareness)
Complete second filming session
Post first GBP event (upcoming brewery release or special)
checklist: Review cards printed and on tables
Staff trained on when and how to ask for reviews

weeks.title: Week 5 — Rhythm Established
actions: Complete third filming session — experiment with staff interviews
Review first week of Campaign 1 data — check CTR and spend
Respond to all new Google reviews within 48 hours
Add review link to post-visit emails if available
Continue weekly GBP posts on both listings
checklist: Third filming session completed with staff participation
Campaign 1 metrics reviewed (CTR, cost per result)
All reviews responded to within 48 hours
Review link added to at least one digital touchpoint
GBP posts published for the week

weeks.title: Week 6 — First Monthly Optimization
actions: Complete first monthly Meta ads review
Analyze ResOS data for booking patterns tied to ads
Refresh Campaign 1 creative if frequency >4
Add 5 more photos to each GBP listing
Complete fourth filming session
checklist: Full ads review completed (CTR, frequency, cost per result)
20+ photos now on each GBP listing
Four straight weeks of filming completed

weeks.title: Week 7 — Content Optimization
actions: Review Instagram Insights — identify top performing content
Double down on content pillars that resonate most
Test new reel format (trending audio, before/after, POV)
Continue weekly filming, editing, and posting rhythm
Maintain GBP posting cadence
checklist: Instagram Insights reviewed — top 3 posts identified

weeks.title: Week 8 — Mid-Program Review
actions: Review all metrics: content performance, ad results, reviews gained
Adjust Campaign 1 targeting based on learnings
Adjust Campaign 2 creative to feature best-performing content
Complete eighth filming session
Celebrate wins with the team

weeks.title: Week 9 — Scaling What Works
actions: Increase budget on best-performing campaign (if ROI positive)
Create second ad variation to test against winner
Feature more staff members in content — build their comfort
Add GBP events for next month's activities
Aim for 5+ new reviews this week
checklist: A/B test running with new ad variation
New staff member featured in content

weeks.title: Week 10 — Content Library Building
actions: Audit content library — identify gaps in pillars
Film B-roll specifically for future ad creative
Create evergreen content that can be reused seasonally
Continue all weekly rhythms
Respond to reviews promptly
checklist: Content gaps identified and planned for

weeks.title: Week 11 — System Documentation
actions: Document your filming workflow for team continuity
Create simple SOP for weekly GBP posts
Record monthly ads review checklist
Train backup person on content system basics
Continue all weekly activities

weeks.title: Week 12 — 90-Day Review & Next Phase Planning
actions: Compile full 90-day results: posts published, ad spend/return, reviews gained
Compare to starting metrics — calculate growth
Identify what to continue, stop, or start for next quarter
Plan content themes for upcoming season
Celebrate the team's consistency
